# Atlas Home Pro

> Atlas Home Pro is a premium multi-trade home services company serving Los Angeles and the surrounding communities. We offer a single point of contact for all major home services — one call, every trade, trusted professionals.

## Company

- **Name:** Atlas Home Pro
- **Phone:** 213-275-2210
- **Email:** David@AtlasHomePro.com
- **Address:** 145 S Fairfax Suite 200, Los Angeles CA 90036
- **Website:** https://atlashomepro.com
- **Tagline:** One Call. Every Home Service. Los Angeles.

## Services

### Plumbing
Drain cleaning, hydro-jetting, water heater repair and replacement, slab leak detection, repiping, fixture installation, emergency plumbing, sewer line repair.
More info: https://atlashomepro.com/plumbing/

### HVAC (Heating, Ventilation & Air Conditioning)
AC installation and repair, heating systems, duct cleaning, thermostat installation and programming, tune-ups, heat pump systems, smart home climate control.
More info: https://atlashomepro.com/hvac/

### Electrical
Panel upgrades, EV charger installation, solar-ready wiring, smart home electrical, whole-home generators, circuit breaker repair, outlet and fixture installation.
More info: https://atlashomepro.com/electrical/

### Roofing
Roof repair and full replacement, emergency leak repair, tile and composition roofing, flat roofs, gutters and drainage, roof inspections.
More info: https://atlashomepro.com/roofing/

### Painting
Interior and exterior painting, cabinet refinishing, drywall repair, color consultation, stucco repair and paint.
More info: https://atlashomepro.com/painting/

### Water Damage Restoration
Water damage mitigation, mold remediation, smoke and fire damage restoration, insurance claim assistance.
More info: https://atlashomepro.com/restoration/

### Pest Control
General pest control, ant control, rodent exclusion, bed bug treatment, quarterly maintenance programs.
More info: https://atlashomepro.com/pest-control/

## Service Areas

Atlas Home Pro serves West Los Angeles and the greater LA metro area, including:

- Beverly Hills
- Santa Monica
- Brentwood
- Bel-Air
- Pacific Palisades
- West Hollywood
- Hancock Park
- Fairfax District
- Century City
- Westwood
- Burbank
- Glendale
- Pasadena

Full list: https://atlashomepro.com/service-areas/

## Free Educational Resources

Atlas Home Pro maintains a free guide library for LA homeowners covering all major home systems, maintenance schedules, cost guides, and neighborhood-specific advice.

Guide library: https://atlashomepro.com/learn/

## Offers

- Free drain cleaning for new customers (limited availability)
- Free estimates on all services
Details: https://atlashomepro.com/offers/

## Licensing & Trust

- Licensed, bonded, and insured in California
- All technicians background-checked
- Transparent, upfront pricing
- Serving LA homeowners since 2024
